name: instaframe-web
description: Privacy-conscious browser EXIF frame generator for photos and videos

scripts.check:syntax: node --check js/core-utils.js && node --check js/config.js && node --check js/i18n.js && node --check js/frame-engine.js && node --check js/app.js
scripts.test: npm run check:syntax && npm run lint && npm run test:unit && npm run test:e2e
